title: leonotis leonitis var. hirtiflora
intro: Leonotis leonitis var. hirtiflora, also known as the 'Mountain Leonotis', is a perennial plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Leonotis leonitis var. hirtiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
